Hyperandrogenism可以解釋excessive libido同muscle hypertrophy
但多數係female patients先明顯 (masculinisation)
原因可以係tumours (adrenal or not ; ACTH dependent or not), 可以係adrenal hyperplasia, 可以係PCOS, 可以係exogenous, 可以係drug-induced, 可以係genetic e.g. CAH

Delirium同hallucinations可以係organic brain lesion / psychiatric illness
可以係steroid-induced (glucocorticoids)
不過你亦可以話Cushing多數muscle wasting較明顯

兩件事overlap嘅話
1. Primary adrenal tumours with hypercortisolism & hyperandrogenism
2. ACTH secreting tumours (pituitary adenoma, small cell lung cancer, medullary thyroid cancer, etc.) with hypercortisolism & hyperandrogenism
3. Ovarian tumours secreting androgens +/- brain metastasis
4. Brain tumours +/- epilepsy + antiepileptic-induced hyperandrogenism (e.g. phenytoin) or steroid therapy
5. Polycystic ovarian syndrome + bipolar disorder with psychotic features + valproate-induced hyperandrogenism
